g.text: IndiaAI Mission (Mar 2024) · ISM 1.0 (Dec 2021) · ISM 2.0 (Feb 2026) · NDC (RE) · Atmanirbhar Bharat
BENEFICIARIES: Tata Electronics · Foxconn · Micron · Reliance · Adani · AWS · MSFT · Google · 1,700+ GCCs · 60,000+ Indian fabless designers · 7.83 cr MSMEs
India AI Policy Architecture — institutional flow
From Cabinet approvals through ministries and agencies down to instruments and corporate beneficiaries
